pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup/export shell scripts explicitly define this path.
Environment setup script (install_gvsig.sh) extracts the Natural Earth populated places dataset to this path.
Environment setup script (install_gvsig.sh) extracts the Natural Earth admin_0_countries dataset to this path.

Independent geopandas analysis of the exact Natural Earth shapefile downloaded from naciscdn.org shows the target layer contains exactly 177 features. A standard spatial join retaining the target structure yields 177 features, making an arbitrary range (100) imprecise.

Independent geopandas analysis of the exact Natural Earth shapefile downloaded from naciscdn.org shows the target layer contains exactly 177 features. A standard spatial join retaining the target structure yields 177 features, making an arbitrary range (250) imprecise.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real-world geographic data from Natural Earth (1:110m Cultural Vectors). Independent verification confirms the target layer ('ne_110m_admin_0_countries') contains exactly 177 polygon features, and the source layer ('ne_110m_populated_places') contains 243 point features. Consequently, a correct spatial join using the countries layer as the target will deterministically produce an output shapefile with exactly 177 features, rather than a range of 100-250. The input and output file paths claimed in the metadata exactly match the environment's initialization scripts.
